{{Quote|Your eopi will require the space of three people. To which of your neighbors do you suggest we deny passage?|[[Luminara Unduli/Legends|Luminara Unduli]]|<ref name="Hide" />}}
The '''eopi''' was a quadruped [[Mammal/Legends|mammal]] native to [[Nadiem/Legends|Nadiem]] similar in appearance to the [[Eopie/Legends|eopie]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. The eopi had mottled [[Color/Legends|green]] skin and a long, trunk-like snout below two bulging [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. Some eopi were known to have been domesticated, and made loyal pets. During the [[Battle of Nadiem]], a local citizen of the planet was forced to leave his pet, named [[Elrod]], behind when his settlement was threatened by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]]. The citzen said "You just run Elrode. You'll be safe. I'll come back for you".
